ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning algorithm used (e.g., SVM, Random Forest) */,
  "params" TEXT /* Model parameters (e.g., hyperparameters, tuning parameters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "MCC" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC) of the model */,
  "disparate_impact" REAL /* Disparate impact of the model */,
  "CV" REAL /* Cross-validation (CV) score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of data used for training, validation, and testing */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the model during evaluation */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Resource usage (e.g., CPU, memory) during evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in MB/GB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., performance, usability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., SVM, Random Forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., hyperparameter, tuning parameter) */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_algorithm" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)
